title: Inpatient Discharge Summary - Community-Acquired Pneumonia
risk_notes: Moderate risk: recent oxygen requirement and antibiotic completion needed.

title: Discharge Instructions - Heart Failure Exacerbation
risk_notes: High risk: medication change, diuretic monitoring, kidney disease, and early follow-up required.

title: Surgical Discharge Summary - Laparoscopic Appendectomy
risk_notes: Moderate risk: post-op wound monitoring and short opioid course.

title: Emergency Department Discharge Instructions - Hyperglycemia
risk_notes: High risk: new insulin start and needs early follow-up.

title: Hospital Discharge Instructions - COPD Exacerbation
risk_notes: High risk: home oxygen, steroid completion, inhaler adherence, and pulmonary follow-up needed.

title: Emergency Department Discharge Papers - Ankle Sprain
risk_notes: Low to moderate risk: mobility limitation and follow-up if symptoms persist.
